data.name: Valse Des Fleurs: Horror RPG Maker Game
data.detailed_description:
Valse des Fleurs is an RPG Maker horror game that takes place in a ballet academy. You take on the role of Anya, a talented ballerina on her first day at the academy whose main goal is to perfect her dancing skills. However, as soon as Anya arrives at the school, she starts having nightmares involving witch-like figures, brainwashed students, and obscene rituals. Now she must find out whether these nightmares are only in her head... or if there is any truth to them.

  • Mysterious witch-like figures patrolling the academy late at night

  • A stamina system which must be observed before Anya runs out of breath

  • A panic meter which must be kept in check for the sake of Anya's sanity

  • Immersive World

  • Made by horror fans

data.short_description: A gifted ballerina, Anya enters a prestigious academy—only to be haunted by nightmares of mind-controlled students and unholy rituals. Are they mere dreams or a twisted reality? Uncover the truth hidden beneath the velvet curtains of Valse des Fleurs.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or Better
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 Capable GPU
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
